metadata.description: Plugins for HVAC and plumbing wholesale distributors using CoWork for Distributors. Built by Tenexity.

plugins.name: tenexity-setup-hvac-plumbing
plugins.description: Single-user setup plugin for HVAC and plumbing wholesale distributors. Bundles seven skills: Onboarding Coach, System Review, First Week Guide, Personal Assistant (always-on conversational logging + task extraction + contact tracking), Daily Briefing (morning + end-of-day), Vendor Pulse (weekly vendor activity from captain's log), Account Drift Detector (flags customers gone quiet). Plus 5 slash commands (/log, /tasks, /briefing, /eod, /tidy). v1.2 turns the workspace into an active personal assistant tailored for distributor work — conversational, vendor-aware, AR-aware, inventory-aware. For team deployments of 5+ employees, use the Tenexity Setup Team plugin instead.

plugins.name: tenexity-setup-team-hvac-plumbing
plugins.description: Multi-user setup plugin for HVAC and plumbing wholesale distributors deploying CoWork across a team of 5-50 employees. Bundles eight skills: Setup Company (admin runs once, ~15 min), Setup User (per-employee, ~7 min including PA activation), System Review, First Week Guide, Personal Assistant (always-on conversational logging + task extraction + contact tracking), Daily Briefing (morning + end-of-day), Vendor Pulse (weekly), Account Drift Detector (monthly). Plus 5 slash commands (/log, /tasks, /briefing, /eod, /tidy). Two-layer architecture splits company-wide context from individual user info — admin populates COMPANY/ once, every employee inherits it. v1.2 turns the workspace into an active personal assistant tailored for distributor work.
